title: PureBreed Gnawler Bone Dog Treat, Beef Flavour, Low in Fat, Delicious Treats to Keep Your Dog Busy
features: DENTAL CARE: Specially designed gnawler bone helps reduce tartar and plaque buildup while keeping your dog entertained
LOW FAT FORMULA: Perfect for weight-conscious dogs, this treat provides a guilt-free chewing experience
CHICKEN FLAVOUR: Delicious chicken-flavoured bone that dogs find irresistible and keeps them engaged
LONG-LASTING: Durable bone structure provides extended chewing time, helping to prevent boredom
CONVENIENT SIZE: Ideal bone shape and size makes it easy for dogs to grip and enjoy their treat
description: Product description Keep your furry friend entertained and satisfied with PureBreed Gnawler Bone Dog Treats. These delicious chicken-flavoured treats are specially designed to keep your dog engaged while providing a satisfying chewing experience. The low-fat formula makes these treats an excellent choice for weight-conscious pets or those requiring a lighter dietary option. Each bone-shaped treat is crafted to provide long-lasting entertainment, helping to reduce boredom and promote positive chewing habits. Perfect for training sessions or as a rewarding snack, these treats offer a guilt-free way to pamper your pet. The convenient size makes them suitable for various dog breeds, while their durable composition ensures a lasting chewing experience. Give your dog the joy of a tasty, engaging treat that supports their natural instinct to chew while maintaining a balanced diet. Ingredients Meat and Animal Derivatives (48% Duck), Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Cereals, Sorbitol, Salt. Analytical constituents: Crude Protein (10%), Crude Fat (1.5%). Crude Ash (8%), Crude Fibre (1.5%), Moisture (30%). Directions Pet Dog Treats Bites Dry Duck Cubes See more
